pageContext.name: Death Trooper Figurine
pageContext.description: In contrast to the Empire's stormtrooper, the elite death trooper's dark armor leaves no doubt as to the nature of their assignments. Serving as bodyguards to high-ranking Imperial officers, the death trooper is also trained in sniping and clandestine commando missions. From the on-body arsenal of gadgets to the exacting geometry of the helmet, fine detailing brings the chillingly efficient Imperial soldier to life.  The Death Trooper Figurine Pewter Collectible stands at approximately 6.1 inches tall.
